title: Performing CRUD operations in DynamoDB using AWS Lambda

section_anchors.text: In this assignment I have created a lambda function in AWS which gets triggered by the API gateway to perform the CRUD operations
AWS Lambda is a serverless function which is event-driven and does not need pre-provisioned servers to execute the code
DynamoDB is a serverless NoSQL database which is highly scalable and can handle a varied amount of traffic
While creating the APIs, I turned on the 'Lambda Proxy Integration' in the 'Integration request' option
I learnt how to set up and configure the AWS Lambda to trigger based on REST API calls and perform CRUD operations on DynamoDB

notes: Manually validated against markdown_evaluation/pdfs/Assignment2.pdf on 2026-04-02 using pdftotext -layout and rendered-page inspection. Screenshots are labeled as prose bullets rather than numbered figure captions, so figure/table gold is empty.
